articles.title: Photos: Beyoncé, Bad Bunny, and Janelle Monáe take artistic liberties with Met Gala dress code
articles.description:
NEW YORK (AP) — Met Gala guests from Beyoncé and Naomi Osaka to Emma Chamberlain did not play it safe this year for the Met Gala, delivering custom works of art in honor of the dress code “Fashion is art.” Beyoncé left the cowboy hat at home and dazzled in a custom Olivier Rousteing sculptural skeleton dress […]
